# WordPress Research Fellows Program: Dept\. of Software Engineering · Summer Research

> Northeastern University WordPress Research Fellows Program: a 10\-week paid summer fellowship for Software Engineering undergraduates\. Applications open for 2027\.

Generated by Yoast SEO v27.9, this is an llms.txt file, meant for consumption by LLMs.

## Pages
- [Blog](http://northeastern-research.local/blog/)
- [Highlights \& Team](http://northeastern-research.local/highlights-team/): Meet the current WordPress Research Fellows cohort and explore shipped research highlights from each program track\.
- [Apply \& Eligibility](http://northeastern-research.local/apply-eligibility/): Eligibility criteria, application steps, key deadlines, and the online application form for the WordPress Research Fellows Program\.
- [Contact](http://northeastern-research.local/contact/): Contact the WordPress Research Fellows program office and explore related campus resources\.
- [Home](http://northeastern-research.local/): A 10\-week paid summer fellowship where undergraduate Software Engineering students build, test, and ship real WordPress tooling alongside faculty mentors\.

## Posts
- [Applications Open for Summer 2027 Fellows](http://northeastern-research.local/applications-open-for-summer-2027-fellows/): Applications for the Summer 2027 cohort of the WordPress Research Fellows Program are now open\. The program expands to six research tracks this year\. Deadline: December 1, 2026\.
- [Building a Faster Block Editor: Performance Track Recap](http://northeastern-research.local/building-a-faster-block-editor-performance-track-recap/): Our performance track cut WordPress block editor time\-to\-interactive by nearly a third by deferring non\-critical scripts and trimming global styles\. A Summer 2026 recap\.
- [Notes on Accessible Color Systems](http://northeastern-research.local/notes-on-accessible-color-systems/): How we audited a design system for WCAG AA accessible color contrast failures and fixed them without breaking the brand palette\. A practical research note\.
- [Meet the 2026 Fellows](http://northeastern-research.local/meet-the-2026-fellows/): Meet the fourteen undergraduates who made up the 2026 WordPress Research Fellows cohort at Northeastern University and discover what they built over the summer\.
- [Plugin Architecture Track: Lessons in Extensibility](http://northeastern-research.local/plugin-architecture-track-lessons-in-extensibility/): The plugin architecture track built an extensible WordPress reporting plugin using hooks, filters, and the Abilities API\. Lessons in WordPress plugin architecture extensibility\.
